purpose: Pre-register the replacement-date decision rules required after H-G1.9 rejected policy revision alone. This plan must be converted into a concrete v3 manifest before any new OPRA OI purchase.

data_policy.purchase_scope: At most one replacement full UTC day of OPRA statistics/OI for the validated v3 manifest unless a later audit proves more than one replacement is required.

replacement_objective.reason: Removing 2023-07-12 without replacement would reduce in_sample count below 4 and high_importance_macro count below 4. A low-volatility in-sample macro replacement preserves the v2 regime balance while avoiding post-hoc gamma-result selection.

allowed_window.reason: Databento EQUS.MINI SPY bars are unavailable before 2023-03-28; v3 replacement must remain in the original in-sample period.

must_have_before_metadata_cost_check: not already used in H-G1 v1 or v2 diagnostics
no gamma/OI result viewed for the candidate date
ranking_order_before_oi_purchase: same macro event family as removed date, preferably CPI
lowest absolute deviation from removed date VIX close 13.54 while staying in low-volatility bucket
earliest calendar date after 2023-03-28 if still tied

post_manifest_sequence: Create concrete v3 manifest using only candidate-selection rules in this plan.
Run manifest validator and paid-cost audit.
Run live metadata cost estimate for the single replacement OI day only.
Download replacement OPRA statistics/OI only if cost guard passes.
Rerun H-G1 enrichment/diagnostic under the review-only v2.1 coverage rule.
Keep H-G1 diagnostic-only unless all gates pass and later MinTRL/PSR strategy evidence exists.
forbidden_claims: paid data approval before concrete v3 manifest validation
